item.name: Sleipnir Horn
item.description: This ebon horn emits a somber tone that summons Odin's loyal steed from the elder primal's side to yours.

mount.name: Sleipnir
mount.action: Summon forth Sleipnir─undying steed of the elder primal Odin. His coat is as dark as void, while his eyes glow a sanguine red.
mount.description: Blessed by the elder primal himself, Sleipnir will forever remain loyal to those who have proven themselves worthy. In addition to being fearless in battle, the dark steed is also able to manipulate his corporeal form to accommodate any rider, large or small.
mount.tooltip:
If it hadn't been
for that horse...
- Erik
